error.description:
The error should follow the OAuth2 error format (e.g. `invalid_request`, `login_required`).

Defaults to `request_denied`.

error_debug.description:
Debug contains information to help resolve the problem as a developer. Usually not exposed
to the public but only in the server logs.

error_description.description: Description of the error in a human readable format.

error_hint.description: Hint to help resolve the error.

status_code.description:
Represents the HTTP status code of the error (e.g. 401 or 403)

Defaults to 400

schema.title: The request payload used to accept a login or consent request.
